title: [InstCombine] Avoid overflow in `foldVecExtTruncToExtElt`
author: dtcxzyw
description:
This weird pattern was introduced by LoopVectorize. But it was placed in an unreachable path, so we cannot assert that the indices are always valid in InstCombine.
Closes https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/180233.

tests.test_body:
define <4 x i64> @PR45314(<4 x i64> %x) {
  %e = extractelement <4 x i64> %x, i32 0
  %t = trunc i64 %e to i32
  %i = insertelement <8 x i32> undef, i32 %t, i32 0
  %s = shufflevector <8 x i32> %i, <8 x i32> undef, <8 x i32> zeroinitializer
  %b = bitcast <8 x i32> %s to <4 x i64>
  ret <4 x i64> %b
}
